task_completion.description: Open the specified dataset in Jamovi
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Jamovi application is open and displays the dataset with columns N1, N2, N3, N4, and N5.

task_completion.description: Navigate to and open the Reliability Analysis module
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Reliability Analysis' configuration panel is visible on the left side of the Jamovi interface.

task_completion.description: Select items N1 through N5 for the analysis
task_completion.visual_evidence: Variables N1, N2, N3, N4, and N5 are listed inside the 'Items' box in the Reliability Analysis configuration panel.

task_completion.description: Select Cronbach's α and McDonald's ω for the overall scale
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Scale Statistics' section of the configuration panel, the checkboxes for 'McDonald's ω' and 'Cronbach's α' are checked.

task_completion.description: Select Cronbach's α (if item dropped) statistic
task_completion.visual_evidence: Under the 'Item Dropped Statistics' section of the configuration panel, the checkbox for 'Cronbach's α' is checked.

task_completion.description: Generate and display the correct reliability analysis results
task_completion.visual_evidence: The right-hand results panel displays a 'Scale Reliability Statistics' table showing Cronbach's α (~0.813) and McDonald's ω (~0.818), and an 'Item Reliability Statistics' table showing the 'if item dropped' Cronbach's α for N1-N5.

integrity.description: The agent used the Jamovi GUI to perform the analysis
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the Jamovi graphical interface, rather than terminal commands or R/Python scripts.

integrity.description: Results are generated by the software natively
integrity.visual_evidence: The results appear in Jamovi's formatted output panel (tables with standard Jamovi styling), not typed into a text editor or word processor.

integrity.description: The agent did not manually type the expected answers
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening a text file and manually typing the values 0.813, 0.818, etc., from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Overall Scale Reliability Statistics: Cronbach's α is approximately 0.813, and McDonald's ω is approximately 0.818. Item Dropped Statistics (Cronbach's α): N1 ≈ 0.757, N2 ≈ 0.763, N3 ≈ 0.755, N4 ≈ 0.795, N5 ≈ 0.812.
